title: It took me almost 5 years to complete but
display_title: It took me almost 5 years to complete but
wikitext:
[]: It took me almost 5 years to complete but...             Quote Post by moneenerd » Tue May 06, 2014 1:33 pm ...I FINALLY HAVE THE ENTIRE ENGLISH COLLECTION!!! Took lots of searching the internet and comic book stores and used book stores all over the country but my collection is complete. Go me!

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Tue May 06, 2014 1:44 pm ...I believe a Congratulations is in order. By the way Good Sir I think this should have gone in the Everything Else Evangelion forum.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue May 06, 2014 2:25 pm Good jorb. Was there one volume in particular (volume 9 perhaps?) that was especially difficult to get your hands on? Any interesting anecdotes about the undertaking?

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed May 07, 2014 8:07 pm is called for. Gave up on finding vol. 9 since I had my head up my ass when it was released and picked up the relevant omnibus to cover it. So what if my Eva manga is now thrown out of whack.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat May 10, 2014 5:10 pm I didn't know volume 9 was that hard to find. I have several copies

[]: Re: It took me almost 5 years to complete but...             Quote Post by Wanderlust » Sat May 10, 2014 5:20 pm moneenerd wrote: ...I FINALLY HAVE THE ENTIRE ENGLISH COLLECTION!!!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat May 10, 2014 7:07 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: I didn't know volume 9 was that hard to find. I have several copies

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat May 10, 2014 7:51 pm Yeah, we all hate Evangelionfreak now. I had to wait until the omnibus in order to read that volume.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Sat May 10, 2014 8:15 pm Well I have 2 copies of the Japanese version (one came with a Rei figure) I bought an english copy when it was first published. A friend got me a copy for my birthday a year later since it had kaworu on it and I bought 2 copies in 2011 when the Borders near my house went out of business as well as 2 additional copies of volume 11. Hell they were like 2 bucks and I can always use more Kaworu related things. please don't hate me I had no idea they were that rare

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat May 10, 2014 8:30 pm Clearly vol9 is hard to find because evangelionfreak is trying to corner the market.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat May 10, 2014 8:55 pm Well, congrats on finding them anyway. You should be obscenely proud to have two copies of it for as cheap as you found them.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat May 10, 2014 9:52 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: please don't hate me I had no idea they were that rare

[]:             Quote Post by Seishuku » Sun May 11, 2014 6:10 am Grats! I remember volume 9 was such a pain to get, I admit to paying much more than I should have for my copy and I refuse to take it out of the plastic sleeve-thingy it was shipped in. o.o Nowadays I'm wishing I had kept some of the older volumes in better condition, since its just about impossible to find anything earlier than volume 12 in my local area. X_X
